<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=249575945 space=UPDM2P version=1 -->
## PAGE 01732: Producing and Consuming Activities dialog

- page_id: `249575945`
- space_key: `UPDM2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/UPDM2P/pages/249575945/Producing+and+Consuming+Activities+dialog
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2015-08-26T15:29:01.714+02:00`
- ancestors: UPDM 2 Plugin Documentation > Dialogs
- labels: ['producing-and-consuming-activities-dialog']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

The **Producing and Consuming Activities** dialog allows you to specify or modify producing and consuming Activities for a selected Operational Exchange.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

To open the **Producing and Consuming Activities** dialog

- In the Specification window of the Operational Exchange, click the Edit (...) button in the selected Producing Activity or Consuming Activity property value cell.
- In the OV-3 Operational Resource Flow Matrix, click the Edit (...) button in the selected Producing Operational Activity cell.
- In the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Operational Exchange Manager dialog' space='UPDM2P']**Operational Exchange Manager** dialog : - Click the **Edit** (...) button in the selected **Producing Operational Activity** or **Consuming Operational Activity** cell. - Click the **Activities** button.

Elements of the dialog are described in the following tables.

| Box | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Update Diagrams | Select to update all related diagrams. Existing diagrams will be updated by displaying a particular operational exchange as a triangle on every Operational Activity Edge connecting producing and consuming activity actions. If the specified Producing and Consuming Activities does not exist in any diagram, you will be suggested to create a new OV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (DoDAF), OV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (MODAF), or NOV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (NAF) diagram. Producing and Consuming Activity actions and the Operational Exchange will be represented in this new diagram. |

| Button | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Add | Click to add a new row for assigning a pair of Producing and Consuming Activities. |
| Remove From Table | Click to delete a selected Producing and Consuming Activities pair. |
| Show Full Paths | Click to show views containing specified activities (see the following figure).Click once again to hide this information. |

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

To specify a pair of producing and consuming activities

1. In the Producing Operational Activity column of a selected row, create a new value:
  - Click the drop-down arrow to open a list of available activities and select one. If you do not see the list of available functions, click [IMAGE alt='' src=''] and select the**Performed Activities** button.
  - Click the “ ... ” button to create a new or select an existing activity from the model. The Select Operational Activity dialog opens, wherein you are able to select or create activities.
2. Perform the same action described above for the **Consuming Operational Activity** column of the same row.

#### PANEL: Related procedures

Related procedures

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Filtering Operational Activities and Functions' space='UPDM2P']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Realized Operational Exchange wizard' space='UPDM2P']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Operational Exchange Manager dialog' space='UPDM2P']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<ac:layout><ac:layout-section ac:type="two_right_sidebar"><ac:layout-cell><p>The <strong>Producing and Consuming Activities</strong> dialog allows you to specify or modify producing and consuming Activities for a selected Operational Exchange.</p><p><ac:image ac:alt="Producing and Consuming Activities dialog" ac:title="Producing and Consuming Activities dialog"><ri:attachment ri:filename="producing_consuming_activities_dialog.png"><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Producing and Consuming Activities dialog" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><p>To open the <strong>Producing and Consuming Activities</strong> dialog</p><hr /><ul><li>In the Specification window of the Operational Exchange, click the <strong>Edit</strong> (...) button in the selected <strong>Producing Activity or Consuming Activity</strong> property value cell.</li><li>In the OV-3 Operational Resource Flow Matrix, click the <strong>Edit</strong> (...) button in the selected <strong>Producing Operational Activity</strong> cell.</li><li>In the <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Operational Exchange Manager dialog" /><ac:link-body><strong>Operational Exchange Manager</strong> dialog</ac:link-body></ac:link>:<br /><p>- Click the <strong>Edit</strong> (...) button in the selected <strong>Producing Operational Activity</strong> or <strong>Consuming Operational Activity</strong> cell.</p><p>- Click the <strong>Activities</strong> button.</p></li></ul><p>Elements of the dialog are described in the following tables.</p><table><tbody><tr><th>Box</th><th>Description</th></tr><tr><td>Update Diagrams</td><td><p>Select to update all related diagrams. Existing diagrams will be updated by displaying a particular operational exchange as a triangle on every Operational Activity Edge connecting producing and consuming activity actions. If the specified Producing and Consuming Activities does not exist in any diagram, you will be suggested to create a new OV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (DoDAF), OV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (MODAF), or NOV-5 Operational Activity Flow Model (NAF) diagram. Producing and Consuming Activity actions and the Operational Exchange will be represented in this new diagram.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><table><tbody><tr><th>Button</th><th>Description</th></tr><tr><td>Add</td><td><p>Click to add a new row for assigning a pair of Producing and Consuming Activities.</p></td></tr><tr><td>Remove From Table</td><td>Click to delete a selected Producing and Consuming Activities pair.</td></tr><tr><td>Show Full Paths</td><td><p>Click to show views containing specified activities (see the following figure).</p><p>Click once again to hide this information.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><p><ac:image ac:alt="Show Full Paths button in Producing and Consuming Activities dialog" ac:title="Show Full Paths button in Producing and Consuming Activities dialog"><ri:attachment ri:filename="show_full_types_button_in_producing_consuming_activities_dialog.png"><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Producing and Consuming Activities dialog" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><p>To specify a pair of producing and consuming activities</p><hr /><ol><li><p>In the Producing Operational Activity column of a selected row, create a new value:</p><ul><li><p>Click the drop-down arrow to open a list of available activities and select one.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:macro-id="017e31a3-8710-4745-b34e-af7b16e45360" ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1"><ac:rich-text-body><p>If you do not see the list of available functions, click <ac:image ac:alt="Filter Options" ac:title="Filter Options"><ri:attachment ri:filename="filter_options.png"><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="_buttons" /></ri:attachment></ac:image> and select  the<strong> Performed Activities</strong> button.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li>Click the “<strong>...</strong>” button to create a new or select an existing activity from the model. The <strong>Select Operational Activity</strong> dialog opens, wherein you are able to select or create activities.</li></ul></li><li><p> Perform the same action described above for the <strong>Consuming Operational Activity</strong> column of the same row.</p></li></ol></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="two_right_sidebar"><ac:layout-cell><ac:structured-macro ac:macro-id="6155de8f-0747-45ec-a574-288c84d1be43" ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Related procedures</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Filtering Operational Activities and Functions" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Realized Operational Exchange wizard" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="UPDM2P" ri:content-title="Operational Exchange Manager dialog" /></ac:link></li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:layout-cell><ac:layout-cell><p> </p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>
````
